tagline: A desktop web-based tool designed for professional photo selection workflows
description:
Smart Pick is a desktop web-based tool designed for professional photo selection workflows. It helps photographers, retouchers, and photo culling operators batch-import portrait photos with single, front-facing subjects, enabling automated initial filtering, manual review, final selection, and album export.

The system provides the following capabilities:
- Photo Import: Support importing photos from local storage, folders, or SD cards.
- Library Management: View total photo count, recommended selections, burst groups, and selected photos.
- Automatic First-Pass Selection: Generate initial picks based on selection score thresholds, weighting templates, and burst-shot fallback rules.
- Burst Sequence Optimization: Review burst groups, view recommended frames, and adjust selections within each group.
- Focus Analysis: Filter photos for review based on focus status, such as sharp, slightly soft, or out of focus.
- Expression Screening: Filter photos by eye status (open, partially closed, closed) and smile detection results.
- Large Image Review: View scores and risk tags, zoom in for detailed inspection, and manually add or remove photos from the selection.
- Export Results: Confirm the final selections and upload them to the Smart Album platform.
author: LCFC
title: Smart Pick
